user.title: Connect Techem
user.description: Enter your Techem portal credentials and unit ID.

reauth_confirm.title: Reconnect Techem
reauth_confirm.description: Update the Techem portal credentials for this entry.

reconfigure.title: Reconfigure Techem
reconfigure.description: Update credentials or move this entry to another Techem unit.

error.already_configured: This Techem unit is already configured.
error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to the Techem portal.
error.unknown: Unexpected error. Check the logs for details.

abort.already_configured: This Techem unit is already configured.
abort.entry_not_found: The selected Techem entry could not be found.

init.title: Techem options
init.description: Tune how often Home Assistant polls the Techem portal.
